## Meeting Purpose

  - [Kyle aims to optimize sales processes, improve deal qualification, and establish better weekly rituals for the team](https://fathom.video/share/Ep8rqaWRYanByeCswzAzzkRkzaYxTx76?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)

## Topics

### Owen's Onboarding Progress
